rag_rules: Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations and nested if-then-else for branching logic
Place input assumptions and output guarantees in annex agree only when concrete bounds or visible relations are provided
generic_rules: Use AGREE logical operators (and, or, not, =>) for contract expressions
Ensure type consistency between helper declarations and expressions (bool, int, real)
Generate guarantees that reference visible identifiers and use named constants when available
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Stateful equations must use `-> pre(t) + step` pattern
Branching logic must use nested `if ... then ... else` syntax
anti_patterns: Avoid placing assumptions or guarantees without concrete bounds or visible feature references
Do not mismatch helper declaration types with expression types
